title: EnrichItemEvent
description: Per-item NDJSON line emitted by `sqlite-graphrag enrich`. Emitted for each memory or entity processed. Status is 'done' (success), 'failed' (error), 'skipped' (item filtered out), 'preview' (dry-run), or 'not_yet_implemented' (operation not fully implemented). Index and total are always present.

item.description: Memory name or entity name being processed.

memory_id.description: Row ID of the memory. Present when status is done and operation targets memories.

entity_id.description: Row ID of the entity. Present when status is done and operation targets entities.

entities.description: Number of entities extracted or updated. Present when status is done.

rels.description: Number of relationships extracted or updated. Present when status is done.

chars_before.description: Character count of the original body. Present for body-enrich operation.

chars_after.description: Character count of the enriched body. Present for body-enrich operation.

cost_usd.description: LLM cost in USD for this item. Absent for OAuth subscriptions and dry-run.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock time in milliseconds for this item.

error.description: Error message. Present when status is failed.

index.description: Zero-based position of this item in the batch.

total.description: Total number of items in the batch.
